General.Name: BLACKHORSE FPO [BHL]
General.Description: Black Horse Mining Limited engages in acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral resource projects in Australia. The Mt Egerton Project comprises one retention license, one granted exploration license and one exploration licence application located in Central Victoria, Australia. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.

0.Name: Mr. David John Frances B.Sc., BSc (Hons)
0.Title: MD, CEO & Director
